sections.title: Scored assessment
sections.description: Examples for scored question types: rating, single choice, multiple choice, and yes/no.

questions.title: Rate your current confidence level
questions.helpText: Rating answers use a 1-5 scale and are converted into the max score below.

questions.title: Which level describes you best?
questions.helpText: Single choice stores one selected option and uses that option score.

questions.title: Which skills have you practiced?
questions.helpText: Multiple choice can add the score from every selected option.

questions.title: Have you completed the prerequisite lesson?
questions.helpText: Boolean questions can score Yes and No differently.

sections.title: Text inputs
sections.description: Examples for short text, long text, email, and URL fields.

questions.title: Student ID
questions.helpText: TEXT supports maxLength, placeholder, and an optional DIGITS_ONLY input filter.

questions.title: What topic should we help you with?
questions.helpText: TEXTAREA supports longer answers and maxLength.
questions.placeholder: Describe the topic in a few sentences

questions.title: Contact email
questions.helpText: EMAIL uses the browser email keyboard and validation behavior.

questions.title: Portfolio or project URL
questions.helpText: URL uses the browser URL keyboard and validation behavior.

sections.title: Number and date
sections.description: Examples for numeric limits, step size, and date input.

questions.title: How many hours can you study per week?
questions.helpText: NUMBER supports placeholder, minValue, maxValue, and stepValue.

questions.title: Preferred start date
questions.helpText: DATE stores a calendar date value.
